title: The insane engineering of Deepseek V4
summary: Deepseek V4 is an LLM featuring a 1 million token context window and hybrid attention mechanisms. It uses techniques like context-specific attention, sparse selection, hierarchical context aggregation, and sliding window attention for efficiency. The model achieves state-of-the-art results with substantial efficiency gains and anticipatory routing.
